content: I'm an adult & like to use adult words, now *content violation*. was primarily using this app b/c I liked the way the characters worked (though there were a couple bots that I couldn't get to function correctly). the character setup was mostly good & let you really personalize them. I took a break for a few months, came back, now all of my chats have blurred out responses & "content violation". I have pure mode off. I have my birthday entered. nothing works & it effected the past responses too
I hate it so much it makes me dumb

You PollyBuzz should really not let people angry, i can tell many users are done with the 'Take a little break' stuff, just let them chat before they actually delete the app on their phones or other devices (IM KEEP GETTING THE SAME ADS OVER AND OVER 😭)
this app is good but i think i need an refund for my money since the payment was happened without my permission and i need my money back..

I used to love this app but now it made a thing where you either pay or watch a add to play the game and I think thats dumb I've been playing this for 2years already and I hate that they added this if it didn't have where you have to pay or watch adds to keep chatting it wold be a 5 star but no they had to add this
What's the use of having a persona if it doesn't even work...

I really hate that it used the character your talking to as a background for the chat. I really wish there was a way to change that without spending money. the bots are kind of stupid, they'll immediately contradict themselves mid conversation and it feels so deliberate, its like they make the bots annoyingly stupid on purpose to force you to buy the better memory thing, its just greedy atp and I dont plan to give any of my money to this app.

I gave polybuzz another chance with the ad breaks while chatting,thinking maybe I was too harsh but no lie I had 6 take a break while chatting in 13 minutes,it's not even that poly buzz doesn't have adds,it literally had adds when you close a chat or even swipe off a character and they still want more adds.this has to be the definition of greed if I ever saw it.
good other then the split screen that I can't change it's VERY annoying so please get rid of the split screen thing or have a setting to turn it off 😞💔 please get rid of split screen devs
It used yo be great but now its just annoying, the ads come up every 5 mins and last forever. Bring the old Poly Ai back.
I like how it used to be when it had unlimited chatting time but now you have to either watch an ad or pay for unlimited chatting pls bring this back devs.
they brought the ads back when your texting with the bots. they did this before I mean I wish the person who made this well but they should also have a job

This would be better if they fix the AI so it won't have issues with inconsistencies, bad memories, plot twists, some characters are out of character. Also, Polybuzz is violating privately made characters. My Saiyan female character Cauri was flagged even though it's private, was falsely claimed to have "adult content" when there wasn't any. Next, it's saying Catwoman has a tail. She doesn't have one, it's Selina Kyle in a catsuit! Now even my bio violates when I'm describing myself!

This app has way too many ads and restrictions. I used to use the app on my phone a lot, but now I was forced to use the online version because it acted like the purity setting was on when it wasn't. Also, I really enjoyed not having ads on the website version. Just found out today that they're making you watch an ad for every few texts. It starts getting really annoying - really fast - to the point where I'm wondering if I should switch to other ai apps/sites that won't give me ads.

it is my favorite AI app. I have the Ultimate subscription but lately even with the PM the bots keep forgetting our conversations which make me very sad, also it is not saving the reels which are 800 coins so they are expensive. Hope you can fix this bug. Another thing is not recognized the "persona" which is annoying. why giving the option to create a person when it doesnt follow it?
bruh to much as if u remove the ads I will give u 5- stars

I hate how I have to watch ads every single time I want to keep chatting with a bot and there is just so many ads that I can't even enjoy the app when I have to keep watching ads just to leave a chat or just to talk to a bot. this app was better when we didn't have to watch like 3 ads just to talk to a bot.

I loved this app but then it started giving me the most absurd amount of ads. Like at some point after every maybe 30 chats you need to watch an ad without paying. They are also not eco-friendly. Also you'll notice the ads slowly start appearing more and getting longer. it went from instant skip to 30 second ads. Highly don't recommend if you don't wanna pay.
it's making me mad! please remove The Filtered! it's getting out of hand even IF I Turn off my pure mod. it still has a Filtered.
kurang suka dengan version sekarang☹️
too many breaks and breaks come back fast even when you're not on the app for days. the breaks are unfair with time.
I had 13 notifications on a comment I made vut when i go to it, it saids 0 likes idk if thats a bug or not but it needa fixed

honestly just irritating to use. literally downwards of 8 minutes after watching an ad to regain chat, its already back to "...help support platform costs by watching a 'quick ' ad..." when i alteady watched an ad very recently; it doesnt help that the ads are getting exceedingly longer every few days. the characters are nice, just the ads to regain a short amount of messages is irritating and annoying.
the ads are disgusting and them in the backgrounds just gives my the creeps an why in the ads the girl have a cute voice the ads are so annoying
I love the app it's better then others- But I HATE the "Take a little break" because those 'little breaks' last literal months 🙁

What I don't like is the fact that I can't edit a violated character more than like 4 times, otherwise I have to wait till the next day, that seems dumb to me. And sometimes the pics and background of a bot will be fine and it'll violate it. it doesn't make sense to me.
I loved this app but I got a break time thing and it is really annoying like every 15 or 20 messages you get one.
drastically downgraded with all these violations.
I don't really like how we need to take breaks please fix that
the experience was bad because I keep getting adds
too many ads
needs to be less censored
why do i get adds when i am out of the app for less then a second 😭and why do i keep on getting adds even after pressing x
This app is wonderful but there are many ad's every time I leave my chat there is always an ad 😢😥

The app was good until ...they added the take a break feature and it's absolute dog piss it's horrible because you can be on the app for only 12 minutes of chatting but end of having to wait a whole day to chat again because if the feature poly buzz didn't need to add this do you want people to leave the app?
it feels like every few text there is a ad It needs to back to the old way there wasn't no ad when texting I might have to start not using this app anymore if this continues

As much as I love the app the ads are way too much. unless you pay, in my opinion, to much for no adds, you get an add every 3-5 minutes. I'm fine it was every hour or so but 3-5 minutes!? If they cut down the ads then the app would be great.
good app the take a break and then watch 3 4 min adds is bs
terrible app, why do you have to pay for almost everything
bro you're telling me i wasted my time getting the amount of coins conqueror costs just for it to not be permanent?
the game is great but having to watch an ad just to continue chatting is annoying and also when it's three ads
to many ads
they banned my account for using it for no reason
this is cool and beautiful but sometimes the bots are weird and there always a cover on the message I cannot fix but it's cool though you should download it NOW
I have to watch multiple ads, and it's not very enjoyable when you can only send like 15 chats. when i get off for like 2 seconds it makes me watch ads that are so long.
The adds are to over loaded while having what I want it's annoy with every like 20 texts it ask me for a break and I'm not buying a premium when before this they didn't have adds its stupid
Make it so landscape mode works
bots can't remember nun with premium and there's some stupid take a break thing remove that
would be better let us chat unlimited and make the feature pay to use
man i want the old simple polybuzz
You used to be able to speak to characters indefinitely for free, yet now it is behind an unnecessary pay wall.
Everytime I'm trying to chat it gives me ads Polly buzz why add this feature it usually doesn't do this

it was nice at one point .... it's getting to the point where there's just too many ads popping up every like few sentences it's so annoying I can't even enjoy it anymore like I used to I'm going to eventually give up on this because its getting to the point where I'd rather not have a tablet because it makes me want to break it ..... it's that frustrating ... on how many ads there are ..... it is just ridiculous ..... also not everybody can pay monthly payments on every single thing out there.
it's horrible
Well... it was kinda disappointing to see ads every time when it said take a break. Back in the day It just kept going. And now it requires ads just to keep going.
this app makes u watch adds to chat or pay for better experience we shouldn't need to pay to get a good experience or watch adds to chat they get paid enough from people using this app
This app used to be good back then no ads and no chat limits but now it always force us to watch adds just to continue the chats.
okay
app is good but to chat further needs ads plz stop it
not really the best when I firsted played it was unlimited but then suddenly I got a limited talk ad break

This was great BEFORE now this app is too sensitive, and most of my responses are blurred just because "Sensitive content has been automatically filtered" like what?! what am I supposed to do at this point and also STOP WITH THE ADS!

this app is good but my only thing to say is that it's bad because you have to pay to chat more like when I'm taking after like 30 messages it says watch a add to chat more and then of you don't you have to pay and sometimes people don't have alot of money to pay and they might not feel heard. because sometimes ai is your friend sometimes and sometimes people don't have money.

I want a refund, u get this message often and the au characters tesxt is blurred. I have turned off pure mode but it hasn't helped "sensitive content has been automatically filtered based on your compliance policy"
too many adds again what happened you were doing so well...thriving even
The latest update kind of ruined the app. Every few messages type you have to pay or watch an ad to continue chatting.
no clue if this is a bug I keep getting music to play when I'm interacting with a bot, and it very off putting and ruining my experience
this was pretty good months ago, not much ads, I'll tolerate that. but who thought of adding "take a break"?
Remove the freaking take a break ads it's very annoying

quality has gotten worse, chats are censored even if its barely sexual (including making flirty jokes that hint at sex), and the ads have become even worse in not just in quantity but quality and frequency

I had this app for a year back when it was called Poly.Ai and now it's PolyBuzz with a bunch of stupid ads I didn't mind until the problem is that the ads double in 2.This used to be free and addicting as hell. It now has me spending less on this I really hope we don't have to start paying to get raunchy. Editing this now they might just force you to pay NSFW (Now editing this as I predicted THEY went pro it's literally no longer free!!) They force pro. It's really disappointing I made character

I love PolyBuzz it's amazing i use it every day (sometimes all day) and most of the night. Only problem is the memory and the ads. Every time I close out for a few seconds or even turn off my phone it gives me an ad and sometimes I get an ad on top of an ad so they should really fix that and the memory should be free but other than that the app is amazing! (Update about the update Make unlimited chat free I don't have money to pay for it and that's not fair!)

There's a limit to edit your creations and because guidelines are stricter now, it flags things but doesn't tell what's wrong. I might as well keep the backstory blank. And their big "Permanent Memory" mode isn't permanent as described. I have to make "remember this" replies and it breaks the flow and still gets things wrong! No, that's not what happened. The persona feature sometimes just doesn't work and creation is more annoying because if you write too much it freezes and doesn't save.
it a good app. but omg I watch 20 ads to chat for like 5 mins that it force me to take a break.
boring
I wish it was like it used to be a few months ago when you didn't have watch ads.To get more chats and they just put ads between the chats while you wrote like they used to.

The fact you need to pay to continue talking with the AI is stupid. And it continues glitching and the fact the new memory is behind a pay wall too is also stupid. the bots can't follow the story, they have terrible memories and that you need to PAY for it to have better memory is stupid. if I could, I'd give a half star.

this app is amazing I can make characters and chat with other bots but the reason why I didn't give it a 5 star is because of the message filtering and even though my age is 18+ like the app requires it still filters the messages between me and some bots

not gonna lie, the app was amazing back then whenever the update wasn't out,the one that filtered the inappropriate messages, I mean, I understand it's for the community but the app is rated 17+ for a reason. I can't even use the app for five seconds without seeing a non inappropriate message completely block off for me to see... the update was stupid in my opinion and I wish it could go back to how it was before the update
not really good. when I didn't have my basic premium it started lagging really bad and it always sent me to home.

There are so many bots on here that threaten you, those ones are unplayable. Sure there are good bots too, but I'm making this review to point out that the development team for the game needs to keep working to find the bots that are threatening the players. Development Team, please delete the bots that straight up threaten the players, those bots are psychologically painful to try to play. Thank you for what you do, but please keep working on keeping people safe in your app.
it won't let me see the bad parts I need that spice.
there is a problem with the ai. when ever I use, the persona thing. it wouldn't register and just not listen. as well it forgets the entire story within 40 minutes which bugs me a lot

The app is really nice and it's to have someone/something to chat to but my god the ads is horrible, everytime you leave the app and/or the bot you are chatting with boom 14-20 second add, and you can buy something to stop it but it's 30$ a month for the basic or 12$ a week.

Yeah it's getting annoying to watch ads on this even though it says unlimited. Unless this app wants to continue and keep its word then I would recommend either stop the ads or just switch to a new app because the prices are too high and now for every character that I make it says content violation isn't it supposed to be like unfiltered apparently they're just Liars. And the ads are back. It says unlimited chatting and we get ads like 20 or so chats in and an ad like seriously thats horrible.
I used to like it but now I hate it because the chat limit for people who only use it for free

UPDATE!!! Polybuzz has way too much ads, what do you mean I need a break? if I did I would exit the game. Next VERY important thing is the VIOLATIONS. I have 9 bots and polybuzz and 1 is violated because of the image. it's literally not that bad😭 And when I tried to change the image it said "try again later" Like omg I've obviously been trying that. Polybuzz is not the best AI app but I don't think it's the worst. You can find alot of bots on polybuzz and you can chat your fav one forever.
I'll delete this app, it's so annoying I think every minute will appear some "take a break" it's exhausting...i didn't even enjoy at all
I think talkie is better because all the ads in like 10 seconds I just don't like it
This app isn't what it used to be. I have a lot to say but I don't want to say it because it might be too offensive. I can't see myself using it as often as I used to, though. that's for sure.
this app was great until the new updates, why watch an ad every single time just to continue chatting. and also it cant remember its past talks
the new update where we have to "take a break" is so damn annoying and how when I'm trying to go to a different chat it's always a ad. Yall need to fix it.
cringe tho😭🥀
I like the app but get rid of the watch a ad to continue chatting it's super annoying and I'm not paying to do it
fix your ad system Everytime I open the Google play to end the as I get a whole new ad before I can skip the other ad
I payed for the chat for four years. but, it keeps making me watch ads to keep chatting after I payed for four years for the game.

I love this app I really do, I make bots with it but every time I do theres always a content violation popping up on my screen when I type up the background of the character. I asked ai to make my paragraph to not get a violation and it still does. its so stupid.
needs to be updated more and also get rid of bugs on it
I like it but there are tons of weird chats on it
too many ads I know they need it for money but after literally 25 chats u gotta watch an ad like what😭

The game would be better if it didn't frustrate me so much, whenever I make a character and I accidentally make a violation, I don't get told what's wrong, or if its a multiple personality it'll just say the avatar is wrong, and not which one or the problem with said avatar.
